title: Cobblemon No Fullness
description: disables fullness feature from cobblemon 1.7 by keeping at 0 permanently
body:
**Cobblemon No Fullness**
📌 Description cobblemon 1.7 added a fullness bar to pokemon this mod basically disables it keeps fullness at 0 permanently any issues or questions you can join cobblemon discord https://discord.gg/cobblemon and ask in my addon support channel https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1396757614993477653/1396757614993477653
